title: SAF Drone Kills 11 at Adikong Market, West Darfur
detail: A drone strike killed at least 11 people at Adikong market in West Darfur, near the Chadian town of Adré. Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF) attributed the attack to the Sudanese Armed Forces. Al Jazeera reported the strike as part of an ongoing pattern of attacks on civilian markets across Darfur and Kordofan. The incident occurred as humanitarian organizations warned of increasingly restricted access due to the intensification of air and drone strikes across the region.

media.caption: SAF drone kills 11 at Adikong market in West Darfur
